meaning: n.[动]全尾蚴,裂头蚴(指寄生于中间宿主鱼肌内的绦虫的幼虫)
examples: The objective is to study the construction of the glucoside chain of Spirometra erinaseienroaei plerocercoid protease.
Human sparagnosis is a rare parasitic disease infected by plerocercoid larva (sparganum) of Spirometra species.
Objective In order to study the construction of the glucoside chain of Spirometra erinaseienroaei plerocercoid protease.
